title: Intense heat Thursday; Heavy rain possible Friday - WITN
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
full_text:
Morning clouds, with scattered coastal showers will give way to sunny skies by Wednesday afternoon. The heat builds on Thursday ahead of a wet day on Friday.
Skies will trend partly cloudy to mostly sunny Wednesday into Thursday with climbing temps. Highs near 90° on Wednesday will jump to the mid 90s Thursday and Friday with the heat index nearing 105° both afternoons. Thursday and Friday will be First Alert Weather Days because of the returning heat along with a risk for heavy downpours and scattered strong storms Friday.
The rip current risk will be moderate along the Outer Banks southward to Cape Hatteras on Wednesday. The remaining beaches southward through the Crystal Coast will have a moderate risk as well.
